description: Compass, GPS tracker & offline maps. No ads, no tracking. MBCompass is a free and open-source compass and navigation app without ads, in-app purchases, or tracking. Lightweight, focused, and built for real use. Compass - Accurate compass with true north and magnetic north - Sensor fusion (accelerometer, gyroscope, magnetometer) for stable readings - Real-time magnetic field strength (µT) - Auto-alert when accuracy drops low enough to matter GPS & Maps - Live location on OpenStreetMap - Offline maps via Mapsforge point MBCompass to a folder containing any .map file and toggle between online and offline - Toggle between OSM tiles and offline maps in Settings Track Recording - Record routes with start, pause, resume, and background support - Smooth polyline rendering on the map - Track stats: distance, duration, average speed, elevation gain/loss, min/max altitude, elevation profile - Star and sort saved tracks - Export as GPX : compatible with OsmAnd, Garmin, and any standard mapping tool App - Light, Dark, and AMOLED themes - Custom bottom navigation bar - Landscape orientation supported - Screen stays on during navigation - Runs on Android 6.0+ - Under 2 MB including offline map support Privacy - No analytics, no crash reporter, no ad network - No Google Play Services dependency - Location processed on-device only - Source: https://github.com/CompassMB/MBCompass Not just a compass. Not a full navigation app. MBCompass sits in between, direction, live map, track recording, and offline maps without unnecessary complexity.
